channel.title: Github on Terminal
channel.description: Recent content in Github on Terminal

item.title: Stepler Package Manager
item.description: Ok guys i made a new package manager called Stepler you can make packages, install packages globally and manage packages. (Stepler Official)[https://github.com/rashmina-a/stepler]

item.title: pidigits1mil
item.description: This tool that i built help you benchmark your PC by running a python code that generates the first 1 million digits of PI , Its cool try it out !
